title: lysimachia hillebrandii
intro: Lysimachia hillebrandii, also known as Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii, belonging to the primrose family (Primulaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lysimachia hillebrandii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit potential antiviral and antifungal activities. Lysimachia hillebrandii can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile plant with various uses.
